zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Milbourne於1467年出生在英國賀福爾波吉爾時，她的父親Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire32歲，母親Jane Baskerville28歲。她於1479年與John Byshoppe在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1522年在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Milbourne于1467年出生在英国賀福爾波吉爾时，她的父亲Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire32岁，母亲Jane Baskerville28岁。她于1479年与John Byshoppe在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1522年在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Milbourne was born in 1467, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, was 32 and her mother, Jane Baskerville, was 28. She married John Byshoppe in 1479, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1522, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Milbourne est née en 1467, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Baskerville, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Byshoppe en 1479, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Milbourne 1467 in Burghill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire 32 und ihre Mutter Jane Baskerville 28. Sie hat 1479 in Wiltshire, England John Byshoppe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Milbourne è nata il nel 1467 nel Burghill, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jane Baskerville, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Byshoppe nel 1479, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1522, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Milbourneが1467年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshireは32歳，母Jane Baskervilleは28歳であった。1479年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでJohn Byshoppeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Milbourne(이)가 1467년 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Baskerville(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 윌츠히르에서 John Byshoppe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Milbourne nasceu em 1467, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Baskerville, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Byshoppe em 1479, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Milbourne родилась в 1467 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Baskerville, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Byshoppe в 1479 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Milbourne nació en 1467, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jane Baskerville, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Byshoppe en 1479, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1522, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
